GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Australian label We Are Kindred has designed a floral-inspired limited-edition deodorant for NIVEA", "In partnership with Vogue Australia, NIVEA has collaborated with three of Australia's leading fashion designers to create a series of limited-edition designs for this innovative range. When one thinks of Australian label We Are Kindred, there is one clear picture that comes to mind: florals. The sister design duo behind the Sydney-based brand, Lizzie and Georgie Renkert, are known for their signature flora-inspired designs, which call on a bohemian spirit of boundless beauty. It was with this spirit in mind that Lizzie and Georgie approached their latest project: designing packaging in which NIVEA will house one of its most-loved products: NIVEA Black & White Fresh deodorant. "We loved teaming up with NIVEA and Vogue to create a limited-edition design for Black & White Fresh deodorant," Liizzie Renkert told Vogue. "It was so much fun bringing our signature floral motifs to life in a whole new way." We Are Kindred is one of three leading Australian fashion labels hand-picked by Vogue Australia, in partnership with NIVEA, to create designs for this new limited-edition range of deodorant, available in stores now. In the We Are Kindred iteration, the brand's botanical influence is present. "We're constantly finding inspiration in botanical images and my house is always full of fresh arrangements," describes Lizzie. "This love of flora is very evident in our collections." This is in part why Vogue chose We Are Kindred for this collaboration. The other reason they were hand-picked by our team of stylists was because of their commitment to natural, breathable and sustainable fabrics, an approach that complements NIVEA Black & White Fresh deodorant itself. NIVEA Black & White Fresh deodorant is made with an antiperspirant formula which keeps skin feeling clean and fresh while protecting clothing. The gentle formula is extremely effective and keeps white stains off black clothing and yellow staining off white clothing for longer. "We mainly work with natural fabrics like viscose, cotton and linen that are breathable and feel good against your skin. We create pieces that we hope people will treasure and want to wear season after season, so we love that NIVEA Black & White Fresh deodorant has technology that protects fabrics from marks," explains Lizzie of the complex science behind the formula. "It also has a delicate fragrance and leaves skin feeling clean, so we wanted to capture that sense of freshness in the design we created for this collaboration." Lizzie and her sister have achieved exactly that—the symmetrical floral motif on the bottle call to mind a fresh, effortless and breezy mood. That's exactly how wearers of NIVEA's Black & White Fresh deodorant should feel too. "Ultimately, we want people to have fun with our designs. When you're wearing beautiful clothing and feeling confident, you're the best version of yourself." You can shop the limited edition deodorant now."
